metadata.description: Wiolett Industries agent plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: project-memory
plugins.description: Persistent, searchable project-level memory for Claude. Two-layer store: lite (always-loaded) and deep (hybrid semantic+keyword search via OpenAI embeddings).

plugins.name: papers
plugins.description: Interact with Papers documents on your behalf using API tokens. Manage documents, directories, shares, and attachments.
